title: cyclosorus pennatus
intro: Cyclosorus pennatus, also known as the Chinese leather fern or cinnamon fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus pennatus include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism and arthritis, and promoting digestion, as well as having antibacterial and antiviral effects. Cyclosorus pennatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a treatment for various health conditions.
